name: Creamy Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onions in butter until transparent but not browned.
2. Add sweet potatoes, zucchini, and broccoli; sauté lightly for 5 minutes or until crisp-tender.
3. Stir in broth; simmer for a few minutes.
4. Add potatoes and seasonings; cook another 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in cream. Taste and adjust seasonings.
6. Heat through.
